question: Which owner decisions must the first Insight Report improve, and which daily, weekly, or monthly report shape would be used often enough to justify retained INSIGHTS state?
context: This determines the smallest useful report, the do-less comparison, and the acceptance evidence; discovery should walk real current decisions without storing private values in the graph.
decision: The first report must improve three named owner decisions already present in the module problem: whether current monthly spending is on track, what changed versus an explicit comparable window, and which category or total warrants inspection. The active candidate shape is one month-to-date report with exact daily, weekly, and monthly window sections plus explicit unavailable or deferred states. An Attention Item section is included only if FR-INSIGHTS-ATTENTION-ITEMS is later activated after its evidence gate. Private values stay outside Lex.
